headline: Northern Trust Announces Asset Servicing Leadership Changes
summary: LONDON, June 02, 2026--Northern Trust announced changes within its Asset Servicing business aligning leadership across the business and positioning it for long-term growth.

raw.headline: Northern Trust Announces Asset Servicing Leadership Changes
raw.summary: LONDON, June 02, 2026--Northern Trust announced changes within its Asset Servicing business aligning leadership across the business and positioning it for long-term growth.

headline: How The Northern Trust (NTRS) Investment Narrative Is Evolving Without New Analyst Signals
summary: Northern Trust’s latest analyst narrative comes with no change in the stock’s price target, leaving the existing level intact for now. With no fresh analyst commentary accompanying this update, the lack of price target movement itself becomes the key signal to weigh. As you read on, you will see how to use this kind of quiet period in the analyst story to track what might matter next for the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story.
